violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. - Observed employee with gloves on exit building to perform duties and then return with gloves on and continue working with food. Corrected on site.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. > Observed employee with gloves on exit food preparation tasks, attend to other duties, and return to prep work without changing gloves.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. > Box of pizza sauce and bacon bits are on the ground in the walk in cooler. These must be elevated on a shelf at least 6 inches above the ground.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Food contact surface of utensil/equipment was not properly cleaned and sanitized. > Noticed knives being stored with food from previous nights shift still present on blade. Corrected on site with general manager.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. > The Pizza conveyor oven needs cleaning along the sides and crevices. Noticeable food debris accumulation over a large period of time.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Cleaning, sanitizing or drying agents * were not adequately stored separate from poisonous, toxic materials or pesticides. > Glass cleaner and degreaser being stored next to hand washing soap and dishwashing detergents near walk in cooler.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
